products.title: Revenue Leak Audit
products.description: Most local businesses already get calls, messages, profile views — but lose customers silently due to missed replies, weak profiles, no clear CTA, no follow-up. The audit scans Google Business, Facebook, and public presence; delivers a 5-leak report with exact fixes — €20-50 per audit, €50-150 for done-for-you fixes.
products.subject_line: I'll show you 3 ways you're currently losing customers — free preview.
products.why_works: They don't need more traffic — they're not converting what they already have. Audit + fix = direct, measurable ROI.

products.title: Ghost Job Detector
products.tagline: Recover Unbilled Revenue from Completed Jobs
products.description: Plumbers, electricians, contractors, repair services routinely complete jobs that never get invoiced — the customer says 'thanks, send me the bill', the tech moves to the next site, the invoice never goes out. The Ghost Job Detector scans WhatsApp, SMS, email, and call logs for completion words ('done', 'fixed', 'finished'), cross-references them against the CRM and invoice ledger, and auto-drafts the missing invoice. €50–150/mo subscription or % of recovered revenue.
products.subject_line: You completed 7 jobs last month that were never invoiced.
wins: Free-scan demo lands in cold email
% of recovered revenue = pure upside pricing
Found money — no behavior change required
before_bullets: Tech says 'done', moves to next site
Owner has no idea the leak exists
products.why_works: 'You worked for free' is undeniable. The free first scan finds the money — the owner pays a slice to keep it flowing.

products.title: Reviews Booster
products.description: Businesses know reviews matter, but they forget to ask, requests are inconsistent, happy customers leave without leaving a review. The system generates a direct review link + QR code, ready-to-use templates, and AI-personalized timed follow-ups. Tone optimization over time. €5-20/mo or €20-50 one-time setup.
products.subject_line: Your reviews are great — but you could be getting more.
wins: More reviews = more visibility = more customers
Easy to sell to almost any business
after_bullets: Direct link + QR at every checkout
products.why_works: More reviews → more visibility → more customers. Fast, visible results that sell themselves.
